tool.name: flights_search
tool.description: Search for flights on Google Flights. Enter origin and destination cities to find available flights with prices, airlines, duration, and stops.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Origin city or airport code (e.g. 'New York', 'JFK', 'London Heathrow')

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Destination city or airport code (e.g. 'Los Angeles', 'LAX', 'Tokyo')

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Departure date in YYYY-MM-DD format (optional, defaults to flexible dates)
